channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

channel.itunes:summary: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: Summit Brewing: Horizon Red Ale, Ep. 144
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we tackle a truly unique brew from the Summit Brewing Company located in St. Paul, Minnesota . Horizon Red Ale is an interesting blend of an IPA and Amber ale that uses a variety of malts from America, England and Germany and adds the hard to find Horizon hops […]

The post Summit Brewing: Horizon Red Ale, Ep. 144 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Sante Fe Brewing: Pale Ale, Ep. 143
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we venture into a new beer from a new state. Sante Fe Pale Ale from the Sante Fe Brewing Company in New Mexico is a robust Pale Ale with a pilsner like maltiness due to the German yeast strain used in brewing . A new find and a nice […]

The post Sante Fe Brewing: Pale Ale, Ep. 143 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: New England Brewing – Elm City Lager, Ep. 92
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
The fine folks at New England Brewing were kind enough to send us a few samples and we start with their Elm City Lager. Named after New Haven’s historic nickname, this is true to a German Pilsner style. Crisp and golden, we found this beer to be refreshing, while distinctly tasting the pilsner malts and […]

The post New England Brewing – Elm City Lager, Ep. 92 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Episode 19 – Dogtoberfest – Flying Dog Brewery
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
A deranged king and a pack of weiner dogs has inspired Flying Dog Brewery to release a beer perfect for Fall’s cool weather and holiday fare . Dogtoberfest is a true German Marzen Style, so much so, it won the Gold in that category at the 2008 GABF!

The post Episode 19 – Dogtoberfest – Flying Dog Brewery first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
